studies.title:
Influence of DiGA sinCephalea on drug therapy of the
Prophylaxis in patients with episodic migraine

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the digital therapeutic product 'sinCephalea' and its influence on drug therapy for migraine prophylaxis. The product name 'sinCephalea' is mentioned multiple times in the title and full text, and the manufacturer Perfood GmbH is identified as the developer.

_classification.study_design: observational study in routine clinical practice
_classification.reason: The study investigates the real-world impact of the DiGA sinCephalea on migraine prophylaxis in a routine clinical setting without randomization, making it an observational study and thus classified as RWE.
